name: Injured walking under forklift load at warehouse job whose fault?
description: Comp pays; avoid under loads per OSHA.[2][4]

mainEntity.name: Injured walking under forklift load at warehouse job whose fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp pays; avoid under loads per OSHA.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Pedestrians shouldn't walk under raised loads; employer ensures safe paths, but comp covers regardless.** OSHA standards apply.[2][4] Key factors: Fault irrelevant for comp; third-party if signage/equipment poor.[3] Report near-misses too.
